positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, and vibrant graphic design featuring interwoven bioluminescent fauna and celestial elements, such as stylized cosmic nebula swirls, blooming abstract flora, and geometric crystalline structures. The main subject should be a central mandala-like composition with strong radial symmetry. Style should emulate intricate tattoo flash combined with mid-century modern vector art. Use a restricted, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, emerald teal, electric magenta, and crisp gold accents. The rendering must be clean, perfectly vectorized, and optimized for screen printing on fabric. Focus on sharp edges, defined silhouettes, and minimal shading, ensuring print-readability and a magical, uplifting mood. Flat illustration style, clean lines, highly decorative composition, centered, apparel print graphic.
negative: blurry, artifacts, signature, watermark, text, copyright, messy, grainy, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, mutation, extra limbs, low detail, photographic, realistic, 3d render
